name: odoo-hack-mern-template
description: Production-quality MERN skeleton for the Odoo hackathon: 3 roles, auth, a cloneable core resource, status workflow, request/interaction, votes, uploads, real-time, admin moderation.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
